subcodes.first_line: The letter, photograph and ode were all presented at the Most Holy Court and were blessed with being both witnessed and heard, God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه و عکس و قصیده کل در ساحت اقدس حاضر و بمشاهده و اصغاء فائز انشاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement
